title: Modern Control Engineering
annotation: The standard undergraduate reference. Dense but comprehensive — transfer functions, root locus, frequency response, and state-space.

title: Feedback Control of Dynamic Systems
annotation: Strong on physical intuition and worked examples. Good for frequency-domain methods and digital control.

title: Modern Control Systems
annotation: Broad coverage of classical and modern control. Useful for root locus, PID tuning, and quick reference.

title: Making Embedded Systems
annotation: Practical patterns for firmware architecture. Best entry point for embedded software design — state machines, driver layering, RTOS concepts.

title: The Definitive Guide to ARM Cortex-M3 and Cortex-M4 Processors
annotation: Authoritative reference for the Cortex-M architecture, NVIC, memory model, and fault handling. The ground truth for ARM-core specifics.

title: Programming Embedded Systems
annotation: Solid coverage of bare-metal C patterns and peripheral driver design. Practical and hardware-focused.

title: The Art of Electronics
annotation: The definitive practical electronics reference. Chapters on op-amps, ADCs, noise, and mixed-signal design are essential reading for any embedded hardware work.

title: Electromagnetic Compatibility Engineering
annotation: The standard reference for PCB EMC — ground planes, return current paths, filtering, and layout for emissions and immunity.

title: On Food and Cooking: The Science and Lore of the Kitchen
annotation: The foundational reference for applied food science. Covers the chemistry of cooking — Maillard reactions, protein denaturation, emulsification, fermentation, and why techniques work.
